name: bar-chart
description: Bar chart is the horizontal orientation of column chart. Unified horizontal bar chart supporting default, interactive, multiple, stacked, label, custom-label, negative, active, and mixed configurations

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: X-axis labels for vertical bar charts. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'] or [{label: 'Jan', value: 0}, {label: 'Feb', value: 1}]

yAxisData.name: yAxisData
yAxisData.description: Y-axis labels for horizontal bar charts. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'] or [{label: 'Jan', value: 0}, {label: 'Feb', value: 1}]

data.name: data
data.description: Chart data. Can be: single series (number[]), multiple series (Array<{data: number[]}>), or named series (Array<{name: string, data: number[]}>). Example: [100, 200, 150] or [{data: [100, 200]}, {data: [150, 250]}] or [{name: 'Series A', data: [100, 200]}]

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the chart series. Overrides theme colors. Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b']

stack.name: stack
stack.description: Stack ID for stacking multiple series. When set, series are stacked on top of each other. Example: 'total'

stackNormalize.name: stackNormalize
stackNormalize.description: Whether to normalize stacked values to show percentages (0-100%). Default: false

barWidth.name: barWidth
barWidth.description: Width of the bars as a percentage string. Example: '60%'

barGap.name: barGap
barGap.description: Gap between bars as a percentage string. Example: '10%'

borderRadius.name: borderRadius
borderRadius.description: Border radius for each corner of the bars [topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft]. Default: [4, 4, 4, 4]

showLabels.name: showLabels
showLabels.description: Whether to show value labels on bars. Default: false

labelPosition.name: labelPosition
labelPosition.description: Position of the value labels on the bars. Options: 'top', 'inside', 'insideTop', 'insideLeft', 'insideRight', 'outside', 'right'. Default: 'top'

labelFormatter.name: labelFormatter
labelFormatter.description: Custom label formatter function. Example: (params) => params.value + '%'

showXAxisLabels.name: showXAxisLabels
showXAxisLabels.description: Whether to show X-axis labels. Default: true

showYAxisLabels.name: showYAxisLabels
showYAxisLabels.description: Whether to show Y-axis labels. Default: false

grid.name: grid
grid.description: Grid positioning configuration. Example: {left: '10%', right: '5%', bottom: '10%', top: '10%'}

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to display a legend for named series. Default: false

positiveColor.name: positiveColor
positiveColor.description: Color for positive values in negative bar charts. Example: '#3b82f6'

negativeColor.name: negativeColor
negativeColor.description: Color for negative values in negative bar charts. Example: '#ef4444'

activeIndex.name: activeIndex
activeIndex.description: Index of the bar to highlight in active bar charts (zero-based). Example: 2

mixedColors.name: mixedColors
mixedColors.description: Whether to use different colors for each bar (mixed bar chart). Default: false

showSplitLine.name: showSplitLine
showSplitLine.description: Whether to show split lines on the value axis. Default: false
